mapper.select:
SELECT i.product_id, p.product_name, p.product_code, i.store_id, s.store_name, i.quantity, i.min_stock AS reorder_point, CASE WHEN i.quantity <= 0 THEN 'OUT' WHEN i.quantity <= i.min_stock THEN 'LOW' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS status FROM retail_inventory i INNER JOIN retail_product p ON i.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN retail_store s ON i.store_id = s.id WHERE i.quantity <= i.min_stock ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.quantity <= 0 THEN 1 WHEN i.quantity <= i.min_stock THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, i.quantity ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM retail_store WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT DATE(sale_timestamp) AS date, SUM(total_amount) AS salesAmount, 0 AS growthRate FROM retail_sales WHERE DATE(sale_timestamp) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY DATE(sale_timestamp) ORDER BY DATE(sale_timestamp)
